allow: Bash(node -e "const {JSDOM}=require\('jsdom'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('/home/slq/my/naviory/tests/fixtures/bookmarks-sample.html','utf8'\); const doc=new JSDOM\(html\).window.document; const root=doc.querySelector\('dl'\); console.log\('root children', [...root.children].map\(n=>n.tagName+':'+n.textContent.trim\(\)\)\); console.log\('desc dt count', root.querySelectorAll\('dt'\).length\); console.log\('dt list', [...root.querySelectorAll\('dt'\)].map\(\(n,i\)=>i+':'+n.textContent.trim\(\).slice\(0,50\)\)\);")
